note: NZQA achievement standards for English. NCEA Level 1 English was significantly revised in 2024 (new standards replace old AS908xx series). Level 2 and 3 are being refreshed. Codes marked verified:false need checking at nzqa.govt.nz. Core skills: reading, writing, speaking, viewing, presenting.
